description: See Volume Unlit Material Examples section for better information on how slicers work.

fields.Mode: The kind of slicer mode this slicer is doing.
fields.HighlightColor: The color highlight to highlight the slicer with. please see Volume Unlit Material Examples section for better info.
fields.HighlightRange: The color highlight range to use. please see Volume Unlit Material Examples section for better info.
fields._colorDialog: The dialog ui currently being used to choose a color to display for the color highlight.
fields._grabGrid: The slot to enable when grabbing the slicer to show the grid visual.

methods.SelectColor: Handles when the user requests to use the slicer.

usage: See Volume Unlit Material Examples section.
